title: Bridge Essay: An investigation of acute physiological and psychological moderators of psychede

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Nonordinary states as controlled experiments in consciousness — predictive processing breakdown and revision.

**An investigation of acute physiological and psychological moderators of psychedelic-induced personality change among healthy volunteers.**. Neuroscience applied.. PMID: 40654586. DOI: 10.1016/j.nsa.2024.104092. This study investigated the effects of asingle high-dose of psilocybin on personality traits in psychedelic-naïve healthy volunteers. These data originate from alarger within-subjects fixed-order design trial, where asingle high dose of psilocybin (25 mg) was administered in apsychologically supportive setting and was compared against a (one-month) prior, 1 mg 'placebo' dose.
